title: Assistant Store Manager - Woodland - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Woodland - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Woodland in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Woodland:
Woodland is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland!
